summary: Cleared all statix and deadnix lint findings across the repository by following the 8-phase plan: skip-commented the 8 intentional-convention deadnix bindings, removed the 11 safe deadnix bindings, applied the 15 auto-fixable statix findings, hand-collapsed all 42 non-excluded repeated-keys (W20) findings (including the judgment-heavy modules/system/desktop.nix), and added path-based statix.toml/ci.yml exclusions for the 4 auto-generated hardware-configuration.nix files. nix flake check stayed green throughout; statix check and deadnix now both report zero findings tree-wide.

artifacts.summary: 8-phase implementation plan, all phases marked [COMPLETED] with per-task verification notes and deviation annotations
Implementation summary covering all 8 phases, plan deviations, and final verification results
New repo-root statix config excluding .direnv and hosts/*/hardware-configuration.nix from repeated-keys findings

completion_data.completion_summary: Cleared all statix (69->0) and deadnix (23->0) lint findings tree-wide, with the 4 auto-generated hardware-configuration.nix files excluded by path (not hand-edited) via a new statix.toml and a ci.yml deadnix --exclude flag. nix flake check stayed green throughout all 8 phases.

next_steps: Optionally consider tightening the two CI lint steps from non-blocking `|| true` to hard-gating now that the tree is lint-clean (noted as a future follow-up in the research report, out of scope for this task).
